description: Single-event reference hook for PreCompact. Fires before Claude compacts conversation history; appends a timestamped marker plus the full hook JSON payload (read from stdin) to /tmp/hook-fired-precompact.log.

hooks.command: p="$(cat)"; { echo "$(date -u +%FT%TZ) preCompact fired"; echo "$p"; echo; } >> /tmp/hook-fired-precompact.log
